initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT item.i_brand, income_band.ib_lower_bound, income_band.ib_upper_bound, SUM(store_sales.ss_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales
FROM store_sales
JOIN store ON store_sales.ss_store_sk = store.s_store_sk
JOIN item ON store_sales.ss_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
JOIN customer ON store_sales.ss_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk
JOIN household_demographics ON customer.c_current_hdemo_sk = household_demographics.hd_demo_sk
JOIN income_band ON household_demographics.hd_income_band_sk = income_band.ib_income_band_sk
JOIN customer_address ON customer.c_current_addr_sk = customer_address.ca_address_sk
JOIN date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
WHERE store.s_state = 'IL'
  AND date_dim.d_date BETWEEN '1999-02-01' AND '1999-04-02'
GROUP BY item.i_brand, income_band.ib_lower_bound, income_band.ib_upper_bound
ORDER BY item.i_brand, income_band.ib_lower_bound, income_band.ib_upper_bound
LIMIT 100

SELECT 
    item.i_brand, 
    income_band.ib_lower_bound, 
    income_band.ib_upper_bound, 
    SUM(store_sales.ss_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales
FROM 
    store_sales
JOIN 
    store ON store_sales.ss_store_sk = store.s_store_sk
JOIN 
    item ON store_sales.ss_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
JOIN 
    customer ON store_sales.ss_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk
JOIN 
    household_demographics ON customer.c_current_hdemo_sk = household_demographics.hd_demo_sk
JOIN 
    income_band ON household_demographics.hd_income_band_sk = income_band.ib_income_band_sk
JOIN 
    customer_address ON customer.c_current_addr_sk = customer_address.ca_address_sk
JOIN 
    date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
WHERE 
    store.s_state = 'IL'
    AND date_dim.d_date BETWEEN '1999-02-01' AND '1999-04-02'
GROUP BY 
    item.i_brand, 
    income_band.ib_lower_bound, 
    income_band.ib_upper_bound
ORDER BY 
    total_sales DESC
LIMIT 100
